title: Banff
subtitle: Unreal nature views

20260612_01.alt: Woman with orange rain shell and black backpack taking an iPhone photo of a lush green landscape from Tunnel Mountain in Banff
20260612_01.caption: Tunnel Mountain, Banff

20260612_02.alt: Distant view of the Bow River from Tunnel Mountain. The water is a pale blue
20260612_02.caption: View from Tunnel Mountain

20260612_03.alt: Woman with a blue rain shell and teal visor smiling, with evergreen trees and a broad landscape including a winding river in the background
20260612_03.caption: Even on a rainy day, the landscape is breathtaking (or perhaps it's the altitude)

20260612_04.alt: Yellow caution sign that reads "Do Not Throw Rocks. Climbers Below"

20260612_05.alt: Mountain partially obscured by low lying misty clouds, with some evergreen trees in the foreground. The vibe is moody.

20260612_06.alt: A winding river cutting between a manicured golf course and a lush forest

20260612_07.alt: Inside of a cave with blue water
20260612_07.caption: Grotto at the Cave and Basin National Historic Site

20260612_08.alt: Outdoor geothermal spring, filled with turquoise water
20260612_08.caption: Cave and Basin National Historic Site

20260612_09.alt: Wooden wall with a rectangular viewport, through which a mountain landscape is partially visible
20260612_09.caption: Peepin'

20260612_10.alt: Mountain landscape with blue cloudy sky

20260612_11.alt: Mountains partially obscured by big fluffy clouds

20260612_12.alt: Partial view of a mural on a giant cube
20260612_12.caption: Makoche Edaha Mini Po (What Steam Rises From the Earth) by Stoney indigenous artists Jarron Poucette and Kyle Kaquitts

20260612_13.alt: Telescope optical viewers in front of a field and mountain landscape

20260613_15.alt: Vast mountain landscape with many evergreen trees dotting the foreground

20260613_16.alt: Evergreen trees in front of a turquoise blue glacial lake
20260613_16.caption: Moraine Lake

20260613_17.alt: A group of tourists scrambles large rocks with mountains in the background
20260613_17.caption: Rock Pile at Moraine Lake

20260613_18.alt: Hiker props a leg up on a rock, staring out at a glacial lake
20260613_18.caption: How is this lake real?

20260613_19.alt: Mountains behind a turquoise glacial lake

20260613_21.alt: A blue canoe floats in a vast glacial lake

20260613_22.alt: Turquoise glacial lake with mountains (Ten Peaks) in the background
20260613_22.caption: A few of the Ten Peaks standing tall at Lake Moraine

20260613_23.alt: Tourists looking out at a mountain view

20260613_24.alt: Slopey mountain with occasional trees, and a blue lake in the foreground with some bright red-orange canoes

20260613_25.alt: Turquoise glacial lake with mountains in the background (some snow on the mountains)

20260613_26.alt: Hand holding up a half sandwich with two bites taken out, in the background is the turquoise glacial lake
20260613_26.caption: I made this smoked meat with havarti, avocado, and microgreens sandwich on Yukon sourdough at the lodge and brought it to Lake Louise and honestly lake views + sandwich really slaps

20260613_27.alt: Blue sky, rocky mountains, green trees, looks similar to Switzerland
20260613_27.caption: Reminds me of Switzerland

20260613_28.alt: A wide river cuts between a rocky canyon and a hill with evergreen trees, with blue sky and puffy clouds above
20260613_28.caption: Bow River in Banff

20260614_29.alt: A set of lodges in the foreground, with mountains in the background
20260614_29.caption: Casual mountain view from one of the lodges

20260614_30.alt: Majestic view of mountains, with a town in the valley
20260614_30.caption: View of Banff from the top of Mount Norquay

20260614_31.alt: A hoary marmot basks in the sun
20260614_31.caption: A hoary marmot basks in the sun

20260614_32.alt: Woman with binoculars looks out upon the mountain view
20260614_32.caption: Exploring

20260614_33.alt: A tall evergreen tree punctuates a mountain view

20260615_35.alt: A silver optical telescope looks out onto a mountain and lake
20260615_35.caption: How many landscapes with an optical telescope in a foreground is she going to share?

20260615_36.alt: Two people sitting on a wooden bench overlooking Emerald Lake
20260615_36.caption: I don't know these people

20260616_37.caption: Even when the sky is cloudy, Lake Louise is beautiful

20260616_38.alt: Portrait-oriented view of Lake Louise, with a figure wearing a bright red coat shot from behind

20260616_39.alt: Male and female harlequin ducks swimming in a vast lake
20260616_39.caption: Harlequin ducks in Lake Louise

20260616_40.alt: Another shot of Lake Louise, with snowy/rocky mountains in the background and a single evergreen tree in the foreground

20260616_42.alt: Red canoe in turquoise waters of the lake

20260616_41.alt: Figure in red crossing a wooden walkway next to the lake

20260616_43.alt: Many old felled trees in the water, which is so clear you can see the rocks at the bottom

20260616_44.alt: Rolling hills that appear a bit spiky with hundreds (thousands?) of pointy pine trees, with a lake in the foreground

20260616_45.alt: Gnarled tree roots and old tree trunks at the lakeshore

20260616_46.alt: Springing tree buds in the foreground, with evergreen trees in the background
20260616_46.caption: Deciduous in the front, evergreen in the back

20260616_47.alt: Cute red-roofed log cabins along the Pipestone River
20260616_47.caption: View from the hotel room

20260616_48.alt: Beautiful bright turquoise lake with a huge hotel at the far lakeshore
20260616_48.caption: Fairview Lookout at Lake Louise

20260617_49.alt: Cute red roof with "Post Hotel Lake Louise" written in all caps, with a mountain in the distance

20260617_50.alt: Dramatic shot of a snow-dusted mountain under a cloudy sky

20260617_51.alt: Cute log cabin style coffee stand on a trail
20260617_51.caption: Coffee stand in the woods is EXACTLY my aesthetic

20260617_52.alt: Turbulent rapids in a creek, with a cloudy appearance
20260617_52.caption: Johnston Creek. I kept saying the water looks like 설렁탕 broth 😅 (it was the second to last day of the trip and I was missing Korean soups, what can I say)

20260617_56.caption: Driving in Banff feels like being in a car commercial 🎵 tap the Rockies 🎵 (wait was that a beer commercial)

20260618_53.alt: Chalet-looking building amidst a sea of trees, with mountains in the background
20260618_53.caption: "Looks like Switzerland" —me, multiple times on this trip

20260618_54.alt: A white wolfdog with yellow eyes rests on a wooden platform made for him
20260618_54.caption: Wolfdog at the Yamnuska wolfdog sanctuary. Majestic, beautiful animals who seemed well taken care of

20260618_55.alt: A tan-colored wolfdog stands confidently between white-barked trees

blurb: It's hard to take bad photos in Banff. I pretty much spent this whole trip saying "OH WOW."
